title: Legacy Core Config Doctor 2026.4.24
objective: A 2026.4.24-shaped core config with stale gateway/runtime/model keys and a preserved user field, used to verify Doctor repairs stale core config without dropping unrelated user config.

setup.title: Write Legacy Core Config
setup.intent: Create stale core config keys from the 2026.4.24 plugin-architecture boundary and write evidence explaining the breaking-change risk.
evidence: doctor upgrade evidence names PR #78896 and PR #79203

setupEvidence: config/kova-doctor-upgrade-evidence.json lists PR #78896 and PR #79203 as breakage evidence
.openclaw/openclaw.json contains legacy gateway_port, runtime.pi, and models.defaultProvider keys
cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes legacy core config fixture files
